code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test18-APR-2024Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low urine specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), suggesting significant renal dysfunction, possibly with tubular involvement. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may indicate recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Further nephrological evaluation and assessment for possible acute or chronic kidney disease and metabolic disturbances are recommended.
